# Coordination Summary

Purpose:

- summarize recent multi-agent dispatch activity
- reduce the cost of reading raw coordination history
- highlight the latest coordinator decision and execution outcome

Rule/State boundary:

- this file is a derived state digest
- canonical workflow rules remain in `SPEC.md`
- the detailed coordination trace remains in `COORDINATION-LOG.md`
- the structured runtime trace remains in `.aidn/runtime/context/coordination-history.ndjson`
